'''Paddy Rice''' is a rice-related crafting material harvested from [[Rice Grains|Rice Crops]].

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Rice wheat.png
| id = rice_wheat
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Rice
| stackable = 64
|Description=Use this to craft rice grains.}}
==Obtaining==
===Farming===

* '''<code>Right click</code>''' [[Rice Grains]] on Farmland and let it fully grown into Paddy Rice.

==Used In==
*[[Rice Grains]]
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
